task: Fix intermittent training deadlock caused by dataloader workers waiting on a shared cache lock.

trajectory.think: Existing debugger and ripgrep tools can find stack traces, but I need a reusable contention summarizer for thread dumps.

arguments.name: analyze_thread_contention
arguments.description: Summarize Python thread dumps and identify lock contention hotspots.

events: sandbox: docker python:3.11-slim, network none, unittest smoke pass
graph edges: depends_on debugger, depends_on ripgrep, categorized_as profiler

arguments.dump:
Thread-A waiting on lock cache_index
Thread-B waiting on lock cache_index

trajectory.patch: Move cache population outside worker lock and use per-key lock striping.
